data.description:
# WU-3 ‚ÄĒ Jira reconciler: inbound TAG_DELTA + intent set

Reroute the Jira **inbound** label applier to emit `TAG_DELTA`, removing the last
live whole-field `EDIT.tags` writer, and update the user-intent extractor so
delta-added tags still drive outbound sync. Depends on WU-1 (event type +
reducer). Outbound (`_diff_labels`) is intentionally unchanged ‚ÄĒ it diffs reduced
state and is event-type-agnostic.

## What / Scope

- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/apply_inbound.py` (:359-432): replace the
  read-reduce-mutate-write whole-list `EDIT{fields.tags=new_tags,source:inbound}`
  (:426-431) with a `TAG_DELTA` built from the add/remove ops it already computes
  (:404-416). Carry `source="inbound"` at the `data.source` level (matching the
  EDIT today). **Dedup `added‚ą©removed`** before emitting (Jira may surface both in
  one pass; there is no command-layer mutual-exclusion guard on this path ‚ÄĒ the
  reducer add-wins contract is the hard fallback, but dedup keeps the event
  clean).
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/local_label_intent.py`
  (`_extract_tags_from_event` :26-67): handle `TAG_DELTA` ‚ÄĒ check
  `data.source=="inbound"` FIRST and return `None` if so (same order as the EDIT
  branch :50), else fold ONLY `data.added` into the ever-seen set. Do **NOT** fold
  `data.removed`: `compute_label_intent_set` is an ever-seen UNION (:107); 
  subtracting removals would resurrect the a06c spurious-REMOVE bug.

## Delivery / green state

No live whole-field `EDIT.tags` writer remains anywhere. Jira round-trips through
deltas: a user-added (delta) tag is pushed outbound; inbound-applied labels do not
count as local user intent. Existing reconciler tests stay green.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Inbound applier emits `TAG_DELTA` (built from computed add/remove ops) with
      `source="inbound"` at `data.source`; `added‚ą©removed` deduped
- [ ] `_extract_tags_from_event` handles `TAG_DELTA`: inbound-source check first
      (returns None), else folds ONLY `added`; `removed` never subtracted
- [ ] Test: a delta-added user tag is pushed outbound to Jira (not suppressed)
- [ ] Test: inbound-sourced `TAG_DELTA` excluded from local user-intent
- [ ] Test: inbound `added‚ą©removed` collision handled (dedup + reducer add-wins)
- [ ] Existing Jira reconciler tests stay green; full suite green
data.title: WU-3 ‚ÄĒ Jira reconciler: inbound TAG_DELTA + intent set
